title: CMD.CHN.001.DSH.RECORD_ENVELOPE_CONSUMPTION — Record an envelope consumption on the dashboard
description: Payload of the RECORD_ENVELOPE_CONSUMPTION command. Issued by POL.CHN.001.DSH.ON_ENVELOPE_CONSUMPTION_RECORDED in response to BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED. Handled by AGG.CHN.001.DSH.BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD. Internal command — no HTTP surface, no autonomous bus event. Updates the matching open_envelopes entry with the post-consumption snapshot AND inserts a new entry in recent_transactions, applying the bounded-retention policy (50 entries / 30 days, INV.DSH.005). Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reliever participation case identifier.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED.

envelope_id.description: Identifier of the envelope that was consumed.

category.description: Spending category label (e.g. "GROCERY", "TRANSPORT"). Non-PII semantic label; raw merchant names are NEVER stored (INV.DSH.001).

transaction_id.description: Identifier of the underlying transaction. Used as the recent_transactions row key — re-emissions of the same transaction (e.g. amendment) replace the existing row.

merchant_label.description: Non-PII merchant label / category icon hint. NEVER a raw merchant name.

allocated_amount.description: Envelope's allocated total after this consumption. Snapshot from upstream — passed through unchanged into open_envelopes.

consumed_amount.description: Envelope's cumulative consumed amount after this transaction.

available_amount.description: Envelope's available balance after this consumption (allocated_amount - consumed_amount).

recorded_at.description: Upstream timestamp at which BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.004.ENV recorded the consumption. Used for ordering in the recent_transactions feed.
